name: Hyaluronic Acid
description: A powerful moisture-binding molecule capable of holding 1000x its weight in water.
scientificSummary: Draws moisture from the environment into the upper layers of the skin.
mechanismOfAction: Draws moisture from the environment into the upper layers of the skin.
